tools.name: auteng_publish_markdown
tools.description:
Publish markdown as a publicly shareable AutEng document.

Proxies to backend endpoint:
POST /api/tools/docs/publish-markdown/

tools.name: auteng_docs_create
tools.description:
Create a document in the agent's workspace.

Requires EIP-191 wallet signature auth. Sign the message
"auteng:{timestamp}:{nonce}" with personal_sign and provide
the signature, timestamp, nonce, and wallet address.

Args:
    wallet_address: 0x... checksummed wallet address
    wallet_signature: EIP

tools.name: auteng_docs_update
tools.description:
Update an existing document in the agent's workspace.

Requires EIP-191 wallet signature auth. See auteng_docs_create for auth details.

Args:
    wallet_address: 0x... checksummed wallet address
    wallet_signature: EIP-191 signature of "auteng:{timestamp}:{nonce}"
    wallet_timestamp: Unix times

tools.name: auteng_docs_list
tools.description:
List documents in the agent's workspace.

Requires EIP-191 wallet signature auth. See auteng_docs_create for auth details.

Args:
    wallet_address: 0x... checksummed wallet address
    wallet_signature: EIP-191 signature of "auteng:{timestamp}:{nonce}"
    wallet_timestamp: Unix timestamp in secon

tools.name: auteng_docs_delete
tools.description:
Delete a document from the agent's workspace.

Requires EIP-191 wallet signature auth. See auteng_docs_create for auth details.

Args:
    wallet_address: 0x... checksummed wallet address
    wallet_signature: EIP-191 signature of "auteng:{timestamp}:{nonce}"
    wallet_timestamp: Unix timestamp in

tools.name: auteng_docs_share
tools.description:
Share a document publicly. Returns a shareable URL.

Rate limited to 10 shares per wallet per day.
Requires EIP-191 wallet signature auth. See auteng_docs_create for auth details.

Args:
    wallet_address: 0x... checksummed wallet address
    wallet_signature: EIP-191 signature of "auteng:{timestam

tools.name: auteng_docs_recent
tools.description:
Browse the public recents feed of shared documents.

No authentication required. Returns recently shared public documents,
newest first.

Args:
    page: Page number (default 1)
    limit: Items per page (default 20, max 100)

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: auteng_docs_recent · Private data: auteng_publish_markdown, auteng_docs_create, auteng_docs_update, auteng_docs_list, auteng_docs_delete, auteng_docs_share, auteng_docs_recent · Public sink: auteng_publish_markdown, auteng_docs_share · Destructive: auteng_docs_delete.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: auteng_docs_recent · Private data: auteng_publish_markdown, auteng_docs_create, auteng_docs_update, auteng_docs_list, auteng_docs_delete, auteng_docs_share, auteng_docs_recent · Public sink: auteng_publish_markdown, auteng_docs_share · Destructive: auteng_docs_delete

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
